title: Regulation Set M-B
notes: Official Pokémon HOME news page for Pokémon Champions Regulation Set M-B.

title: Eligible Pokémon
supports: Regulation M-B eligible Pokémon English roster
notes: Parsed by server/scripts/crawl_regulation_mb.py into raw and curated JSONL.

title: Eligible Pokémon
supports: Regulation M-B eligible Pokémon Korean roster
notes: Used for nameKo in curated species JSONL.

title: Speed Calculator | Pokemon Champions Tools
supports: raw non-HP stat formula with AP/stat points
notes: Client bundle exposes calcStat({base, iv=31, ap=0, nature=1, level=50}) = floor((floor((2*base+iv+2*ap)*level/100)+5)*nature) and effective-speed multipliers.

title: Pokémon Champions Speed Tiers — Live Speed Calculator | ChampDex
supports: stat point limits 32 per stat / 66 total
notes: Client bundle exposes MAX_SP_PER_STAT=32, MAX_SP_TOTAL=66, evsToSp/spToEvs, calculateStat, and applyStatStage.

title: is Pokemon Faster? | A Pokemon Speed Calculator
supports: cross-check that speed calculators consider stat boosts, IVs, EVs, Choice Scarf, Tailwind, paralysis, Trick Room, and abilities
notes: General Pokémon speed calculator, not Champions-specific; useful as a cross-check source only.

title: irfandfr/is-this-mon-faster
supports: open-source general Pokémon speed calculator reference
notes: General Pokémon speed calculator repository found from search; not Champions-specific.

title: Eligible Held Items
notes: The current official page shell contains eligible/banned item containers but no explicit item arrays; server/scripts/crawl_pokemon_held_items.py records this and enriches battle held-item categories from PokeAPI.
